name: plan-review
purpose: Build the review artifact and route tasks through proceed or review-comment paths.
rules: Every non-trivial task needs a review artifact.
Comments must stay task-scoped and actionable.
warnings: A good plan can still hide rollback gaps.
blockers: Plan has no explainable rollback or evidence path.
examples: Request review before deleting files or changing secrets handling.
authority_boundary: May request review or clear low-risk work to proceed. It may not approve blocked actions without policy basis.
